SPEECH.SPEAKER: PEDDLER
SPEECH.LINE: Oh I come from a land
From a faraway place
Where the caravan camels roam
Where they cut off your ear /Where it's flat and immense
If they don't like your face /And the heat is intense
It's barbaric, but hey--it's home!
When the wind's at your back
And the sun's from the west
And the sand in the glass is right
Come on down,
Stop on by
Hop a carpet and fly
To another Arabian night!
Arabian nights
Like Arabian days
More often than not
Are hotter than hot
In a lot of good ways
Arabian nights
'Neath Arabian moons
A fool off his guard
Could fall and fall hard
Out there on the dunes.
Ah, Salaam and good evening to you worthy friend.
Please, please, come closer--(Camera zooms in hitting
peddler in face) Too close, a little too close. (Camera
zooms back out to CU)There.Welcome to Agrabah. City of
mystery, of enchantment, and the finest merchandise this
side of the river Jordan, on sale today, come on down!
Heh, heh. Look at this! Yes! Combination hookah and
coffee maker--also makes Julienne fries. Will not break
broke. Ooohhh! Look at this! Pulls out Tupperware) I
have never seen one of these intact before. This is the
famous Dead Sea Tupperware. Listen. (Pries it open,
makes raspberry sound.) Ah, still good. (Camera begins
to pan to right. PEDDLER hurries to catch it.) Wait,
don't go! (Stop pan.)I can see that you're only
interested in the exceptionally rare. I think then, you
would be most rewarded to consider...this. (PEDDLER
pulls the MAGIC LAMP out from his sleeve.) Do not be
fooled by its commonplace appearance. Like so many
things, it is not what is outside, but what is inside
that counts. (Another pan, this one slower to left.
Again, PEDDLER rushes to catch up.) This is no ordinary
lamp! It once changed the course of a young man's life.
A young man who liked this lamp was more than what he
seemed. A diamond in the rough. Perhaps you would like
to hear the tale? (PEDDLER pours shiny sand from the
lamp into his hand.) It begins on a dark night (PEDDLER
throws sand into the sky, where it forms a starry
nightscape.) , where a dark man waits, with a dark
purpose.

he has just done this.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Nice goin' Abu. Breakfast is served.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN and ABU on the roof break open the melon and eat. We see J
ASMINE walking through the street.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SHOPKEEPER 1
SPEECH.LINE: Pretty lady, buy a pot. No finer pot in brass
or silver.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SHOPKEEPER 2
SPEECH.LINE: Sugar dates, sugar dates and figs! Sugar
dates and pistachios!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SHOPKEEPER 3
SPEECH.LINE: Would the lady like a necklace. A pretty
necklace for a pretty lady.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (She is charmed by the action, but is startled by a fish thrust
into her face.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SHOPKEEPER 4
SPEECH.LINE: Fresh fish! We catch 'em, you buy 'em!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: I don't think so. (She backs away, but bumps into
a fire eater, who is startled into swallowing his
fire.) Oh, excuse me. (He gulps, then belches
fire from his mouth. JASMINE is disgusted. He is
pleased and taps his stomach. ALADDIN sees her,
and a strange look comes over his face.) I'm
really very sorry.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (He's obviously deeply in love with her.) Wow!
jumps up on his shoulder, waving his hand in front of ALADDIN's

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (She pulls the hood of her cloak over her head. ABU sees him and
face.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Uh oh. Hello? Hello?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JASMINE stops at the fruit stand and sees a young homeless child
reaching for a piece of fruit. She picks one up and gives it to
him.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, you must be hungry. Here you go. (The
boy runs off.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: PROPRIETOR
SPEECH.LINE: You'd better be able to pay for that.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (Mystified) Pay?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: PROPRIETOR
SPEECH.LINE: No one steals from my cart!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, I'm sorry sir. I don't have any money.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: PROPRIETOR
SPEECH.LINE: Thief!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Please, if you let me go to the palace, I can
get some from the Sultan.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: PROPRIETOR
SPEECH.LINE: Do you know what the penalty is for stealing?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He takes her hand and pins it down on the table, intending to
chop it off.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: No, no please!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The sword drops, but his hand is stopped by ALADDIN's.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Thank you kind sir. I'm so glad you've found
her. I've been looking all over for you.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (whispering) What are you doing?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (whispering back) Just play along.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: PROPRIETOR
SPEECH.LINE: You know this girl?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Sadly, yes. She is my sister. She's a little
crazy. (He circles his finger around his ear.
She is shocked. The PROPRIETOR grabs him by
the vest.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: PROPRIETOR
SPEECH.LINE: She said she knows the Sultan!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: She thinks the monkey is the Sultan.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU is picking a pocket. He hears this, then straightens up.
JASMINE, playing along, kneels and bows to ABU.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, wise Sultan. How may I serve you?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Well, blah blah blah blah.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Tragic, isn't it? (He leans forward, picking
up another apple from the cart with his
foot.) But, no harm done. (Walks over to
Jasmine.) Now come along sis. Time to see the
doctor.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (To a camel standing nearby) Oh, hello doctor.
How are you?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: No, no, no. Not that one. (To ABU, whose
pockets are bulging.) Come on, Sultan.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU bows to the crowd and everything he's stolen from the cart falls
out.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: PROPRIETOR
SPEECH.LINE: Huh? What is it? (ABU picks up what he can
carry, and the trio run off.) Come back here,
you little thieves!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to int. of JAFAR's lab. IAGO is running on a gear in a bizarre
contraption. At the top of the contraption is a storm brewing.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: (huffing and puffing) With all due respect, your
rottenness, couldn't we just wait for a real storm?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Save your breath, Iago. Faster! (He places the
SULTAN's ring in the contraption.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Yes, o mighty evil one.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (IAGO runs faster. A lightning bolt streaks through the ring, passing
into an hourglass below. The sands begin to swirl.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Ah, sands of time--reveal to me the one who can
enter the cave. (The sand in top forms the Cave of
Wonders. It falls through into a storm, but it
shows ALADDIN climbing up a ladder, followed by
JASMINE who is covered in her cloak.) Yes, yes!
There he is. My diamond in the rough!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: That's him?!?! That's the clown we've been
waitin' for? (IAGO loses his footing and is sucked
into the gears.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Let's have the guards extend him an invitation to
the palace, shall we?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (IAGO goes flying past and slams into the wall upside down.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Swell.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR laughs hideously, and the camera zooms in on the sandstorm with
ALADDIN in it. Finally, we dissolve into the real ALADDIN climbing
to the top of the ladder, followed by JASMINE.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Almost there.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JASMINE climbs over the top, but trips and falls into ALADDIN's arms.
She stands up.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: I want to thank you for stopping that man.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Uh, forget it. (He grabs a pole.) So, uh, this is
your first time in the marketplace, huh?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN pole vaults to the next building, leaving JASMINE behind.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Is it that obvious?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Well, you do kinda stand out. (He stares at her,
still in love. She returns the look. But he
realizes what he is doing, and returns to normal.)
I mean, uh, you don't seem to know how dangerous
Agrabah can be. (He lays a plank between the
buildings for her to walk over, but as he is leaned
down, she vaults over his head. He looks back in
surprise. She tosses the pole to him. Both
ALADDIN's and ABU's eyes bulge.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: I'm a fast learner.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Right. C'mon, this way. (They go inside the roof
of a building, dodging planks and beams as they
go.) Whoa. Watch your head there. Be careful.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Is this where you live?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Yep. Just me and Abu. Come and go as we please.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Fabulous.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Well, it's not much, (he pulls back the curtain and
exposes the palace) but it's got a great view.
Palace looks pretty amazing, huh?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, it's wonderful.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: I wonder what it would be like to live there, to
have servants and valets...

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, sure. People who tell you where to go and how
to dress.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: It's better than here. Always scraping for food
and ducking the guards.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: You're not free to make your own choices.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Sometimes you feel so--

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: You're just--

SPEECH.SPEAKER: BOTH
SPEECH.LINE: (in unison) --trapped.
another. But ALADDIN then realizes where he is, and breaks the

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They look at each other, realizing that they're perfect for one
look. He takesthe apple out of ABU's hand and rolls it down his
arm into the hand of JASMINE.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: So, where're you from?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What does it matter? I ran away, and I am not
going back.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Really? (He takes a bite from the apple in his
hand, then hands it to ABU, who has a disgusted
look on his face.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Why you!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN walks over and sits next to JASMINE.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: My father's forcing me to get married.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: That's--that's awful. (ABU appears from behind the
princess and tries to steal the apple.) Abu!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU races up to a higher point, chattering and cursing as he goes.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Abu says that--uh--that's not fair.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: What?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh did he?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Yeah, of course.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: And does Abu have anything else to say?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Well, uh, he wishes there was something he could do
to help.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, boy!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Hmm, tell him that's very sweet.
ALADDIN leans in to kiss her. He is interrupted, however,

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN and JASMINE have been getting closer and closer, until
by the GUARDS, who have found them.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GUARD
SPEECH.LINE: Here you are!
ALADDIN and JASMINE: They've found me! (To each other) They're
after you?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: My father must have sent them--

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Do you trust me?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Do you trust me? (He extends his hand)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Yes. (She takes it.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Then jump!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They both jump off the roof, fall and land in a pile of salt. They
try to get away, but the exit is blocked by a GUARD.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GUARD
SPEECH.LINE: We just keep running into each other, don't we,
street rat?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Again, the GUARD's turban is pulled down by ABU, but more guards are
here and block the exit. The first GUARD pulls ABU off his head and
throws him in a vase. Three other GUARDS grab ALADDIN.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GUARD
SPEECH.LINE: It's the dungeon for you, boy.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Hey, get off of me!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Let go of him.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GUARD
SPEECH.LINE: (Not realizing she is the princess) Look what we
have here, men--a street mouse. (He throws her
down.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (standing up and pulling off the hood of her cloak)
Unhand him, by order of the princess.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The GUARDS suddenly stop and bow, forcing ALADDIN to bow as well.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GUARD
SPEECH.LINE: Princess Jasmine.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: The princess?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: (peeking out from the vase) The princess?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GUARD
SPEECH.LINE: What are you doing outside the palace? And with
this street rat?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: That's not your concern. Do as I command. Release
him!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GUARD
SPEECH.LINE: Well, I would, princess, but my orders come from
Jafar. You'll have to take it up with him.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The GUARDS drag ALADDIN out, bowing as they go.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (getting a very pissed-off look) Believe me, I
will.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to int. of palace, JAFAR emerging from his secret chambers. He
slides the door shut carefully, but the princess comes storming
in before he is finished. He slams it shut, pinning IAGO inside
the door frame.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Jafar?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, uh, princess.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Awk! Jafar, I'm stuck!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: How may I be of service to you? (He spreads out his
cape, hiding the door.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: The guards just took a boy from the market, on your
orders.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Your father's charged me with keeping peace in
Agrabah. The boy was a criminal.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What was the crime?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: I can't breathe, Jafar!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Why, kidnapping the princess, of course.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: If you could just--(JAFAR kicks him back inside the
door and it slams shut)--wow, that hurt!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: He didn't kidnap me! I ran away!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: (Walking away as if shocked) Oh, dear! Oh, why
frightfully upsetting. Had I but known.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What do you mean?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Sadly, the boy's sentence has already been carried
out.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What sentence?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: (with a sinister tone) Death. (JASMINE gasps.)
By beheading.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: No! (She collapses to the floor.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: I am exceedingly sorry, princess.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: How could you? (She runs from the room crying.)

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (IAGO finally makes it out through the door. He flies up and lands on
JAFAR's shoulder, coughing.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: So, how did it go?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: I think she took it rather well. (They both get a
sinister smile on their faces.)

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Diss. to JASMINE at night, crying at the edge of the fountain. RAJAH
comes over to comfort her. She pets him.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: It's all my fault, Rajah. I didn't even know his
name.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to int. of dungeon. Rats scurry by, and we descend until we see
ALADDIN chained to the wall.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (to himself) She was the princess. I don't believe
it. I must have sounded so stupid to her.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: (from a distance) Yoo-hoo! Aladdin? Hello!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU appears at the window at the top of the dungeon.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Abu! Down here! Hey, c'mon--help me outta these.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU stops, then begins chattering wildly, dropping to the ground. He
wraps a cloth around his head and makes his eyes big in an
imitation of the princess.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Hey, she was in trouble. Ah, she was worth it.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU jumps up on ALADDIN's shoulders and pulls a small set of tools
out of his pocket, then frees ALADDIN.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Yeah, yeah, yeah.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Don't worry, Abu. I'll never see her again. I'm a
street rat, remember, and there's a law. She's
gotta marry a prince, she deserves it.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU finally frees ALADDIN's hands.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Ta da!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (Rubbing his wrists) I'm a--I'm a fool

SPEECH.SPEAKER: OLD MAN
SPEECH.LINE: You're only a fool if you give up, boy.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (We see an OLD MAN sitting in the corner that neither ALADDIN nor ABU
have seen before.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Who are you?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: OLD MAN
SPEECH.LINE: A lowly prisoner, like yourself. But together,
perhaps we can be more.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: I'm listening.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: OLD MAN
SPEECH.LINE: There is a cave, boy. A cave of wonders. Filled
with treasures beyond your wildest dreams.
Treasure enough to impress even your princess, I'd
wager.
'princess' as "prin-CESS" rather than the standard pronunciation
of "PRIN-cess." The OLD MAN turns his back, and IAGO sticks

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Listeners will note that the OLD MAN pronounced the word
his head out of JAFAR's "old man" disguise.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Jafar, can ya hurry it up? I'm dyin' in here!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: But the law says that only a prince can marry--

SPEECH.SPEAKER: OLD MAN
SPEECH.LINE: You've heard of the golden rule, haven't you boy?
Whoever has the gold makes the rules.(He grins,
showing a hideously bad mouth.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: So why would you share all of this wonderful
treasure with me?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: OLD MAN
SPEECH.LINE: I need a young man with strong legs and a strong
back to go in after it.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Ah, one problem. It's out there, we're in here?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The OLD MAN walks to a wall and pushes open a hidden exit.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: OLD MAN
SPEECH.LINE: Mmm, mmm, mmm., Things aren't always what they
seem. So, do we have a deal?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN looks at ABU, who shrugs his shoulders.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, hmm.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to desert scene. We see ALADDIN leading a horse with the
OLD MAN and ABU on it. Diss. to cave of wonders.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: CAVE
SPEECH.LINE: Who disturbs my slumber?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: It is I, Aladdin.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: CAVE
SPEECH.LINE: Proceed. Touch nothing but the lamp.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The cave opens up with a roar, and a staircase appears in front of
ALADDIN. )

SPEECH.SPEAKER: OLD MAN
SPEECH.LINE: Remember, boy--first fetch me the lamp, and then
you shall have your reward.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: C'mon, Abu. (to ABU hiding under the shoulder of
his vest.)

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN begins to descend the staircase. He reaches the bottom
and enters a golden chamber filled with treasure.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Would ya look at that!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Uh oh!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Just a handful of this stuff would make me richer
than the sultan!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU peeks out, sees the treasure, then bolts for it.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Abu!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU stops in mid run, hovering over a rug on the floor.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Don't...touch...anything! We gotta find that lamp.
off the floor and begins following them. ABU gets the feeling

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They begin to make their way through the room when the CARPET rises
they're being followed.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Huh?
the CARPET begins to follow again. Again, ABU turns back, but the
CARPET is rolled up and leaning against a pile of treasure. ABU

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He turns, and the CARPET lies flat on the floor. He continues, and
runs to ALADDIN and tugs his pant leg.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Aladdin! Aladdin!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Abu, will ya knock it off?
ABU's tail. When ABU jumps around, CARPET again goes to the other
side. This time, ABU lands in a karate stance. CARPET reaches
face. ABU and CARPET both jump scared, and run away. ABU tackles

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Again the CARPET follows, but this time, when ABU turns, the carpet
jumps to the other side. It reaches down with a tassel and pulls
down and plucks ABU's hat off, then puts it on himself. ABU sits
thinking for a second, until CARPET waves a tassel in front of his
ALADDIN and turns his head to look at the CARPET.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Abu, what are you--crazy?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The CARPET peeks out from behind a pile of treasure.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: A magic carpet! C'mon. C'mon out. I'm not gonna
hurt you.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The CARPET slowly comes out, shyly, then picks up ABU's hat and dusts
it off. It flies over to ALADDIN and hands the hat to ABU next to
him. ABU screeches, and jumps onto ALADDIN's shoulder.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Take it easy, Abu. He's not gonna bite.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The CARPET again picks up ABU's hat and hands it to him. ABU shakes
his fist and screeches at it. CARPET begins to walk away, "sadly.")

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Hey, wait a minute. Don't go. Maybe you can help
us. (CARPET looks back, excited. It then flies
over and wraps around the pair.) Hey, whoa! You
see, we're trying to find this lamp. (CARPET
motions for them to follow it.) I think he knows
where it is.
underground cavern. In the centre of the room is a tall pillar,
with a staircase going up to it. It is surrounded by water
with unevenly placed stones forming a bridge. At the top of

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They pass through a long cave, until they emerge in a giant
the pillar is a beam of light. ALADDIN begins to cross the bridge.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Wait here!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Oh. Huh?
giant ruby. ABU is hypnotically drawn to it. ALADDIN climbs the
stairs quickly. CARPET sees ABU and grabs his tail trying in vain

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU sees a shrine with a golden monkey. The outstretched paws hold a
to hold him back. ALADDIN finally reaches the MAGIC LAMP.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: This is it? This is what we came all the way down
here to-- (He looks down and sees ABU break free
of CARPET's hold and lunge toward the jewel.) Abu-
NO!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU grabs the jewel. There is a rumbling and the room begins to
shake.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: CAVE VOICE
SPEECH.LINE: Infidels!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Uh oh!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: CAVE VOICE
SPEECH.LINE: You have touched the forbidden treasure. (ABU
places the jewel back into the paw, but the jewel
and the shrine melt into lava.) Now you
will never again see the light of day!
bridge. He looks left and right and sees rocks exploding into lava.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN races down the steps, but they flatten into a ramp, and he
skies down until he flies into the air. The water has turned into
lava. He is falling toward it, when all of a sudden CARPET appears
and catches him. ABU is standing on one of the rocks of the

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: So what'll it be, master?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

few provisos, a couple of quid pro quos

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Like?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Lies flat, then gets up and transforms into a

mean limitations? On wishes? (To ABU) Some all
powerful genie--can't even bring people back from

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They start to leave, but a big blue foot stomps down in front of
them.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Excuse me? Are you lookin' at
me? Did you rub my lamp? Did you wake me up, did

GENIE takes the form of a stewardess, with lots of

here,here, here, here, here, here, here, here,
here, anywhere! Keep your hands and arms inside
the carpet. Weeee'rrrrrreee...outta here!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The CARPET and passengers fly out of the sand in the desert and off

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Jafar, this is an outrage. If it weren't for all
your years of loyal service... . From now on,
you are to discuss sentencing of prisoners with me,
before they are beheaded.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: I assure you, your highness, it won't happen again.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine, Jafar, now let's put this whole messy
business behind us. Please?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: My most abject and humblest apologies to you as
well, princess. (He takes her hand to kiss it, but

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: At least some good will come of my being forced to

power to get rid of you.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: That's nice. All settled, then. Now, Jasmine,
getting back to this suitor business, (he
looks and sees Jasmine walking out) Jasmine?
Jasmine! (He runs after her.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: If only I had gotten that lamp!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: (As JASMINE) I will have the power to get rid of
you! D'oh! To think--we gotta keep kissing
up to that chump, and his chump daughter for the
rest of our lives...

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: No, Iago. Only until she finds a chump husband.
Then she'll have us banished--or beheaded!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: BOTH
SPEECH.LINE: Eeewww!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: (Has an idea) Oh! Wait a minute! Wait a minute!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: (He looks at IAGO in insult) What?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Okay, you marry the princess,all right? Then, uh,
you become sultan!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Oh!Marry the shrew? I become sultan. The idea has

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Yes, merit! Yes! And then we drop papa-in-law and
the little woman off a cliff! (Dive bombs into the
floor) Kersplat!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Iago, I love the way your foul little mind works!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Both laugh as we cut to an oasis in the desert, where CARPET is
coming in for a landing.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Still as stewardess) Thank you for choosing Magic

until the rug has come to a complete stop. (As

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, you sure showed me. Now about my three wishes-

SPEECH.LINE: Dost mine ears deceive me? Three? You are down by
ONE, boy!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Ah, no--I never actually wished to get out of the
cave. You did that on your own.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (GENIE thinks for a second, then his jaw drops. He turns into a

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Well, don't I feel just sheepish? All right, you
baaaaad boy, but no more freebies.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Fair deal. So, three wishes. I want them to be
good. (To GENIE) What would you wish for?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (GENIE is hanging like a hammock between two trees.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Me? No one's ever asked me that before. Well, in
my case, ah, forget it.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: What? No, tell me.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Freedom.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: You're a prisoner?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: It's all part-and-parcel, the whole genie gig.
Itty bitty living space

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Grows gigantic, voice echoes) Phenomenal cosmic
powers! (Shrinks down, cramped in MAGIC LAMP.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Genie, that's terrible.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Comes out of the LAMP) But, oh--to be free. Not
have to go "Poof! What do you need? Poof! What do
you need? Poof! What do you need?" To be my own
master, such a thing would be greater than all the
magic and all the treasures in all the world! But
what am I talking about, here? Let's get real
here. It's not gonna happen. Genie, wake up and
smell the hummus

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Why not?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: The only way I get outta this is if my master
wishes me out. So you can guess how often that's
happened.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: I'll do it. I'll set you free.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Head turns into Pinocchio's with a long nose) Uh

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: No, really, I promise. (He pushes the nose back in
and GENIE's head returns to normal.) After make my
first two wishes, I'll use my third wish to set you

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Well, here's hopin'. (Shakes ALADDIN's hand.)
O.K. Let's make some magic! (Turns into a
magician.) So how 'bout it. What is it you want
most?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Well, there's this girl--

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Eehhh! (Like a buzzer, and GENIE's chest shows a
heart with a cross through it.) Wrong! I can't
make anybody fall in love, remember?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, but Genie. She's smart and fun and...

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Pretty?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Beautiful. She's got these eyes that just...and
this hair, wow...and her smile.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Sitting in a Parisian cafe with ABU and CARPET.)
Ami. C'est l'amour.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: But she's the princess. To even have a chance, I'd
have to be a--hey, can you make me a prince?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Let's see here. (Has a "Royal Cookbook".) Uh,

Brute? Ah, to make a prince. (Looks slyly at
ALADDIN.) Now is that an official wish? Say the
words!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Yanks out his finger, and we see SEBASTIAN the crab from

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Genie, I wish for you to make me a prince!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: All right! Woof woof woof woof! (Takes on square

a tailor/fashion designer.) First, that fez and

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: He's got the outfit, he's got the elephant, but

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (We zoom out slowly with the oasis in the distance, as fireworks
begin to explode outward. Cut to a CU of a pile of toys.
(Look for the BEAST here.) We tilt up and see the SULTAN
balancing them. He carefully balances the last piece on top,

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Sire, I have found a solution to the problem with
your daughter.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Awk! The problem with your daughter!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, really?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: (Unrolling a scroll) Right here. "If the princess
has not chosen a husband by the appointed time,
then the sultan shall choose for her."

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: But Jasmine hated all those suitors! (He tries to

away. The SULTAN absentmindedly pulls the cracker
back.) How could I choose someone she hates?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (IAGO is relieved, but the SULTAN quickly stuffs a
cracker in his mouth.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Not to worry, my liege. There is more. If, in the
event a suitable prince cannot be found, a princess
must then be wed to...hmm...interesting.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: What? Who?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: The royal vizier! Why, that would be...me!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Why, I thought the law says that only a prince can

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Desperate times call for desperate measures, my
lord. (He pulls out the staff and hypnotizes the
SULTAN with it.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Yes...desperate measures...

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR

Prince Ali, Handsome is he, Ali Ababwa

To gawk and grovel and stare at Prince Ali!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He smiles. JAFAR does not.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Look out, Polly!

SPEECH.LINE: Out of the way, I'm coming in to land. Jafar,

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Spectacular, your highness.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: I don't trust him, sire.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Nonsense. One thing I pride myself on Jafar, I'm

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JASMINE walks in quietly.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine will like this one!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: And I'm pretty sure I'll like Princess Jasmine!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Your highness, no. I must intercede on Jasmine's
behalf. (JASMINE hears this and gets mad.) This
boy is no different than the others. What makes

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Your majesty, I am Prince Ali Ababwa! (He pricks
JAFAR's goatee, which springs out in all

your daughter!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: How dare you! (They all look at her surprised.)
All of you, standing around deciding my future? I
am not a prize to be won! (She storms out.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, dear. Don't worry, Prince Ali. Just give
Jasmine time to cool down. (They exit.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: I think it's time to say good bye to Prince
Abooboo.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Diss to JASMINE on her balcony at night. We tilt down and find

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: What am I going to do? Jasmine won't even let me
talk to her. I should have known I couldn't pull
off this stupid prince wish. (ABU struggles with

it, and the banana squirts into his eye. He then

same.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE

That's a good move. (As Rodney Dangerfield) I
can't believe it--I'm losing to a rug.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

puts on his turban, which lights up as the GENIE.)

GENIE comes out holding the real turban.) Al, all
joking aside, you really oughtta be yourself.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN pulls the chain turning off the light.

I'm gonna go see her. I gotta be smooth, cool,
confident. How do I look?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN flies up to the balcony on CARPET. JASMINE is on her bed,

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (From a distance) Princess Jasmine?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Who's there?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: It's me--Prince Ali. Ahem--(Then he jumps to his

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

SPEECH.LINE: Just leave me alone.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Over the edge of the balcony, CARPET is watching with GENIE below.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: How's our beau doing?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (CARPET cuts his neck with his finger.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE

I have servants that go to the marketplace for me.
Why I even have servants who go to the marketplace
for my servants, so it couldn't have been me you

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE

SPEECH.LINE: Punctual?

SPEECH.LINE: Beautiful.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: BEE

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Right, a prince like you. And every other stuffed shirt,
swaggering, peacock I've met!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: BEE

Mayday!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Just go jump off a balcony! (She turns and walks away)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: What?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: BEE
SPEECH.LINE: Stop her! Stop her! Do you want me to sting her?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

SPEECH.SPEAKER: BEE
SPEECH.LINE: Okay, fine. But remember--bee yourself! (BEE buzzes into
his turban)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Yeah, right!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What!?!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Uh, you're right. You aren't just some prize to be
won. (He looks disappointed.) You should be free
to make your own choice. (JASMINE and RAJAH look
at each other in confusion.) I'll go now. (He
steps up on the ledge and drops off.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (She looks over the edge and sees the CARPET.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

SPEECH.LINE: Is it safe?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Sure. Do you trust me?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (She looks at him at the saying of that all-

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (Extends his hand the same as before) Do you trust

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: A thrilling chase

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: A wondrous place

SPEECH.SPEAKER: BOTH
SPEECH.LINE: For you and me!

at a Chinese New Year celebration, sitting on a rooftop.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: It's all so magical.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Yeah.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (She looks at him and decides to burst the bubble)
It's a shame Abu had to miss this.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Nah. He hates fireworks. (CARPET looks up
realizing what is happening.) He doesn't really
like flying either. (And now ALADDIN realizes it)
That is...oh no!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (She pulls off his turban) You are the boy from the
market! I knew it. Why did you lie to me?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine, I'm sorry.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Did you think I was stupid?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: No!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: That I wouldn't figure it out?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Who are you? Tell me the truth!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: The truth? (He looks at CARPET who wave him on,
giving up hope.) The truth...the truth is...I

SPEECH.LINE: Why didn't you just tell me?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Well, you know, um...royalty going out into the

don't you think?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Not that strange.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Good night, my handsome prince.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Sleep well, princess.
kiss sooner than expected. She walks away slowly then turns and

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Yes! (He falls back onto the CARPET, who descends
to the ground.) For the first time in my life,
things are starting to go right.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He looks up at JASMINE's balcony, and four sets of hands grab him.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN

Muffled words) Abu! Abu! (We see the elephant
hanging from a net tied in a tree.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GUARD
SPEECH.LINE: Hold him!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Shackles are placed on his feet and his hands. Another GUARD ties

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: I'm afraid you've worn out your welcome, Prince
Abooboo. (Walks away.) Make sure he's
never found.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (A GUARD hits him in the head, and he falls unconscious. Cut to a

He is conscious now, but his feet are tied to a rock. The rock
hits the sea bottom, then the turban lands and the lamp tumbles
out. He sees this and struggles to rub the lamp. However, he
loses consciousness and falls to the floor. The lamp, unsettled
by his movement, rolls down and rubs against his hands. It shakes,
and GENIE emerges with a bath brush, rubber duckie, and shower cap)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Never fails. Get in the bath and there's a rub at
the lamp. (Squeaks the duck) Hello. (Sees
unconscious ALADDIN) Al? Al! Kid, snap out of it!
You can't cheat on this one! I can't help you
unless you make a wish. You have to say "Genie I
want you to save my life." Got it? Okay. C'mon
Aladdin!! (He grabs ALADDIN by the shoulders and
shakes him. His head goes up, then falls.) I'll
take that as a yes. (Head turns into a siren.)
Wooga! Wooga! (Turns into a submarine.) Up
scope! (He babbles in something that sounds like
German. On the surface, a giant water spout
emerges, and lands on top of the cliff. ALADDIN
reawakes and coughs the water out of his lungs.)
Don't you scare me like that!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Genie, I--uh, I-uh...(He can't think of how to say
it, so they just hug each other.) Thanks, Genie.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, Al. I'm gettin' kind of fond of you, kid. Not
that I want to pick out curtains or anything.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to JASMINE in her room, humming "A Whole New World" and brushing
her hair. The SULTAN appears in one of the double doors,hypnotized.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, father--I just had the most wonderful time.
I'm so happy.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: (Still monotone from the hypnosis) You should be,
Jasmine. I have chosen a husband for you.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: (The other door opens and reveals JAFAR.) You will
wed Jafar.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JASMINE gasps at the sight of him.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: You're speechless, I see. A fine quality in a
wife.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: I will never marry you. (She goes to the SULTAN)
Father, I choose Prince Ali!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Prince Ali left!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (A quick pan finds ALADDIN standing in the doorway to the balcony.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Better check your crystal ball again, Jafar!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Prince Ali!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR gasps at the sight of ALADDIN.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: How in the he--(back to parrot-ese)--uh, awk!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Tell them the truth, Jafar! You tried to have me
killed.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: What? (He goes to the SULTAN) Ridiculous
nonsense, your highness. He is obviously lying.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He brings the staff close to the SULTAN's face.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Obviously...lying.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN sees the staff with its glowing eyes.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Father, what's wrong with you?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: I know!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN grabs the staff and smashes it on the floor. JAFAR flinches
and the spell is broken for good.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, oh, oh my!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Your highness, Jafar's been controlling you with
this! (He advances the staff)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: What? Jafar? You, you traitor!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The trio advances on JAFAR.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Your majesty, all of this can be explained.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Guards! Guards!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Well, that's it--we're dead, forget about it. Just
dig a grave for both of us. We're dead.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (But JAFAR sees the lamp in ALADDIN's pocket. He makes a move, but
is grabbed by guards.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Arrest Jafar at once.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: This is not done yet, boy!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR pulls a vial from his pocket. ALADDIN sees this and rushes
him, but JAFAR throws the vial to the floor. A large red cloud
appears. When it is gone, so is JAFAR.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Find him, search everywhere!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine, are you all right?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Yes.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They lean in to kiss, but the SULTAN barges between them.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Jafar, my most trusted counselor, plotting against
me all this time. Just horrible. How will I ever-
Can it be true? My daughter has finally chosen a
suitor? (She nods) Ha ha! Praise Allah! You
brilliant boy, I could kiss you! I won't--I'll
leave that to my--. You two will be wed at once!
Yes, yes. And you'll be happy and prosperous, and
then my boy, you will be sultan!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He stops in mid sentence and looks at the pair.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Sultan?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Yes, a fine upstanding youth like yourself, a
person of your unimpeachable moral character is
exactly what this kingdom needs! (ALADDIN looks
concerned at this.)

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to int. of JAFAR's chambers. JAFAR and IAGO enter.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: We gotta get outta here! We gotta get-- I gotta
start packing, your highness. Only essentials.
JAFAR smiles broadly.) Travel light! Bring the
guns, the weapons, the knives (Stops and takes out
a picture of himself and JAFAR) and how about
this picture? I don't know--I think I'm making a
Oh, boy--he's gone nuts. He's cracked. (IAGO
flies down to him and knocks on his head.) Jafar?
Jafar? Get a grip, Jafar! (JAFAR grabs him around
the neck) Good grip!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (IAGO starts throwing things out of his cage.
weird face in it. (JAFAR starts to laugh wildly.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Prince Ali is nothing more than that ragged urchin
Aladdin. He has the lamp, Iago.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Why that miserable--

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: But you are going to relieve him of it!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Me?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to ext. of palace. ALADDIN is looking at the gardens.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Sultan? They want me to be sultan?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (GENIE comes out of lamp)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Huzzah! Hail the conquering hero! (Turns into a
one-man band. He sees ALADDIN walk away with his
head hung. He stops, scratches his head, comes up
with an idea, then zooms over to ALADDIN. He holds
up his hands like a director scoping a picture and
we look through them.) Aladdin, you've just won
the heart of the princess. What are you gonna do
next? (ALADDIN looks at him, then walks away in
sadness to the bed, where he falls on it and sighs.
GENIE again is confused, then goes to him and pulls
out a script labeled "Aladdin." Whispering: )
Psst, your line is "I'm going to free the genie."
Anytime.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Genie...I can't.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Sure you can. You just go "Genie, I wish you
free." (He grabs ALADDIN's head and uses
him as a mock ventriloquist's dummy. ALADDIN pulls away.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: I'm serious. Look, I'm sorry--I really am. But
they want to make me sultan--no!, They want to make
Prince Ali sultan. Without you, I'm just Aladdin.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Al, you won!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Because of you! The only reason anyone thinks I'm
anything is because of you. What if they find out
I'm not really a prince? (Quietly) What if
Jasmine finds out? I'll lose her. Genie, I can't
keep this up on my own. I can't wish you free.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Sarcastically) Hey, I understand. After all,
you've lied to everyone else. Hey, I was beginning
to feel left out. Now, if you'll excuse me,
master. (He says the last word in disgust, then
poofs back into the lamp.)

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU and CARPET are watching from the window.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Ohhh.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Genie, I'm really sorry. (A tongue comes out of the
spout and raspberries him.) Well, fine. (He slams
a pillow on top of the LAMP.) Then just stay in
there! (He looks at ABU and CARPET.) What are you
guys looking at? (They both leave.) Look, I--I'm
sorry. Wait, Abu-- wait--I'm sorry, I didn't--
wait, c'mon. (He sighs.) What am I doing?
Genie's right--I gotta tell Jasmine the truth.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (From a distance) Ali, oh Ali--will you come here?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (Putting on his turban) Well, here goes. (He walks
into the garden.) Jasmine? Where are you?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (We see IAGO wearing a beak and standing on stilts next to a FLAMINGO
in the pond. He is imitating JASMINE's voice.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Ahem--In the menagerie, hurry.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: I'm coming.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (We see ALADDIN hurry past, not noticing the birds. IAGO laughs,
then turns back and looks into the face of a FLAMINGO, who is
panting.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: FLAMINGO
SPEECH.LINE: D'uh!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Ya got a problem, pinky? (He sweeps the bird's
feet out from under it. IAGO runs into the palace
and finds the lamp under the pillow.) Boy, Jafar's
gonna be happy to see you! (Stretches his face
like JAFAR's and imitates it.) Good work, Iago!
of one to ten, you are an eleven! (Normal) Ah,
Jafar--you're too kind. I'm embarrassed, I'm

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Normal) Ah, go on. (JAFAR) No, really--on a scale
blushing. (He flies away with the lamp.)
(Cut to the palace entrance. The SULTAN is standing on top, making
an announcement to the people.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: People of Agrabah, My daughter has finally chosen a
suitor!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to behind the curtain, where JASMINE is peeking. ALADDIN
appears at the bottom of the stairs.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Ali, where have you been?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: There's something I've got to tell you.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: The whole kingdom has turned out for father's
announcement!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: No! But Jasmine, listen to me, please!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Good luck! (She pushes him out onto the platform
with the SULTAN, where he overlooks the entire
crowd.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: ...Ali Ababwa!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, boy!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Far above, IAGO and JAFAR watch through a window.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Look at them, cheering that little pipsqueak.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Let them cheer.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He lifts the lamp and rubs it. GENIE comes out.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: You know Al, I'm getting (turns and sees JAFAR)
reallyyyyyy--I don't think you're him. (He
descends and consults a playbill.) Tonight, the
role of Al will be played by a tall, dark and
sinister ugly man.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: I am your master now. (He throws GENIE to the
ground and puts his foot on GENIE's face.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: I was afraid of that.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Genie, grant me my first wish. I wish to rule on
high, as sultan!!!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Cut to ext where dark clouds circle the castle. The castle shakes.
The roof rips off and the SULTAN and ALADDIN duck.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Whoa!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Bless my soul. What is this? What is going on?
flies up, then is stripped of all his clothing except his boxer

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (His turban lifts off his head. When he grabs it, his whole body
shorts. The clothing reappears on JAFAR.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Heh heh heh!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Jafar, you vile betrayer.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: That's Sultan Vile Betrayer to you.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, yeah? Well, we'll just see about that! (Pulls
off his own turban, but finds it empty) The lamp!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Finders-keepers, Abooboo.
the clouds.. ALADDIN whistles and CARPET flies up to greet him.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They both look up and see a gigantic GENIE lift the palace into
They fly up near the GENIE's head.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Genie! No!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Sorry, kid--I got a new master now. (He places the
palace on top of a mountain.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Jafar, I order you to stop!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: There's a new order now--my order! Finally, you
will bow to me!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The SULTAN bows, but JASMINE does not.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: We'll never bow to you!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Why am I not surprised?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: If you will not bow before a sultan, then you will
cower before a sorcerer! (To GENIE) Genie, my
second wish--I wish to be the most powerful
sorcerer in the world!
and another GENIE (tm) brand lightning bolt strikes JAFAR,

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (GENIE extends his finger. ALADDIN tries to stop him, but he cannot,
returning him to his normal look.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Ladies and gentlemen, a warm Agrabah welcome for
Sorcerer Jafar!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Now where were we? Ah, yes--abject humiliation!
they both bow to him. RAJAH comes running at him.
He zaps RAJAH, and the tiger turns into a kitty-
cat.) Down, boy! Oh, princess--(lifts her chin
with his staff)--there's someone I'm dying to
introduce you to.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He zaps JASMINE and the SULTAN with his staff, and

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (off-camera) Jafar! Get your hands off her!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR zaps ALADDIN. CARPET flies away.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Prince Ali
Yes, it is he,
But not as you know him.
Read my lips and come to grips
With reality
Yes, meet a blast from your past
Whose lies were too good to last
Say hello to your precious Prince Ali!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR brings the two of them closer in the air.)
(JAFAR zaps ALI back to ALADDIN.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Or should we say Aladdin?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine, I tried to tell you.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: So Ali turns out to be merely Aladdin
Just a con, need I go on?
Take it from me
His personality flaws
Give me adequate cause
To send him packing on a one-way trip
So his prospects take a terminal dip
His assets frozen, the venue chosen
Is the ends of the earth, whoopee!
So long,

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Good bye, see ya!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Ex-Prince Ali!
a tall pillar, then launches it like a rocket, but not before
CARPET can get in. F2B, then we see a snowy wasteland, where
the pillar crashes and rolls. It finally comes to a stop.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR has zapped ABU back to normal. He sends the two of them into
ALADDIN emerges, obviously very cold.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Abu? Abu! (He looks back at a shivering pile of
snow.) Oh, this is all my fault--I should have
freed the genie when I had the chance. (He digs
out ABU and cradles him inside his vest.) Abu!
Are you okay? I'm sorry, Abu--I made a mess of
everything, somehow. I gotta go back and set
things right. (He starts to walk through the snow,
and he eventuallysteps on a frozen CARPET.)
Carpet! (He looks up and sees CARPET is pinned by
the pillar. He tugs to try and free CARPET. He
can't do it, so he begins to remove snow from the
base of the pillar.) Abu, start digging! That's
it! (Finally, enough snow has been removed, and
the pillar begins to roll. ALADDIN runs away,
looks back, then slides into place. The pillar
rolls over him, and when it is gone, ALADDIN and
ABU are left sitting in the patch of snow made by
the window of the pillar.) Yeah! All right! (He
looks up at his turban, made out of scared ABU.
CARPET shakes off the snow and rushes over to pick
them up.) Now, back to Agrabah! Let's go!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (We cut back to ext. long shot of Agrabah, shrouded in red clouds.
Cut to int. and slow zoom of throne room. IAGO has the SULTAN
tied up like a marionette, and JASMINE is chained next to the
throne.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Puppet ruler want a cracker? Here's your cracker.
Shove 'em all right down your throat. Here, have
lots!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR pulls the chain, and JASMINE walks up to him holding an apple.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Leave him alone!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (IAGO stops for a second, then continues.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: It pains me to see you reduced to this, Jasmine.
A beautiful desert bloom such as yourself should be
on the arm of the most powerful man in the world.
you say, my dear? Why, with you as my queen...

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He takes a bite out of the apple she is holding.)
(He waves his finger and a crown appears.) What do
(She picks up a glass of wine and throws it in his face.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Never!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: I'll teach you some respect! (She falls back as he
raises his hand to slap her. Then he stops.) No.
Genie, I have decided to make my final wish. I
wish for Princess Jasmine to fall desperately in
love with me.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (We see ALADDIN race back into town.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Again as Buckley) Ah, master-- there are a few
addendas, some quid pro quo-

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Don't talk back to me, you stupid blue lout! You
will do what I order you to do, slave!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JASMINE looks up and sees ALADDIN in the window, motioning her to
play along.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (She stands and puts the crown on her head.)
Jafar! I never realized how incredibly
handsome you are.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The GENIE's jaw drops.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: That's better. (He pulls the GENIE's jaw up like a
shade.) Now, pussycat, tell me more
about...myself.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: You're tall, well dressed...

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR walks over to her. ALADDIN jumps down with ABU and GENIE
sees them.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Al! Al, little buddy!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Shh!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Literally zips his mouth shut, then unzips it.)
Al, I can't help you--I work for senor psychopath,
now. (His head turns into JAFAR's, then back.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Hey--I'm a street rat, remember? (He rezips GENIE's
mouth.) I'll improvise.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He slides down a pile of coins and hides close to JAFAR and JASMINE.
JAFAR's back is to ALADDIN.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Go on.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: And your beard...is so...twisted! (She has her
arms around him. She pretends to twist with her
finger, but she is actually motioning for ALADDIN
to come over. He makes his move. IAGO sees him.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Jaf--mmmmmm! (ABU grabs him and covers his mouth.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: And the street rat?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: What street rat?
turns to look, but JASMINE grabs him back and kisses him. ALADDIN

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They are about to kiss when IAGO manages to knock over a bowl. JAFAR
looks disgusted. IAGO and ABU both look disgusted.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ABU
SPEECH.LINE: Yuck!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: That was--(he sees ALADDIN's reflection in her
crown.) You!! How many times do I have
to kill you, boy?

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He zaps ALADDIN. JASMINE rushes him, and he throws her to the
ground. ALADDIN rushes and grabs the staff.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Get the lamp!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JASMINE runs to it. JAFAR, however, shakes off ALADDIN, then
zaps her into an hourglass.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Ah, ah, ah, princess--Your time is up!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Sand begins to fall from the top onto her.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, nice shot, Jaf-- (he is knocked out by ABU.)

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU rushes for the lamp.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Don't toy with me! (He's zapped into a toy monkey.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Abu!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (CARPET rushes in.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Things are unraveling fast, now boy. (CARPET is
zapped and unravels. ALADDIN again rushes for the
lamp.) Get the point? (His path is blocked by
large swords sticking in the floor. JAFAR grabs
the lamp and laughs hideously. ALADDIN pulls a
sword out of the floor.) I'm just getting warmed
up! (He breathes a ring of fire around ALADDIN.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Are you afraid to fight me yourself, you cowardly
snake?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: A snake, am I? Perhaps you'd like to see how
snake-like I can be! (He smiles broadly, and we
see a snake's tongue come out from behind his
teeth. He then turns into a giant cobra, and the
ring of fire around ALADDIN becomes part of the
snake encircling ALADDIN. The snake JAFAR makes
moves on ALADDIN, and on the third try, ALADDIN

SCENE.STAGEDIR: swings the sword and hits JAFAR. Cut to GENIE
cheerleaders wearing 'A' sweaters.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Rickem, rockem, rackem, rake--stick that sword into
that snake!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: You stay out of thissss!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (GENIE waving a tiny pennant with a 'J' on it.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Weakly) Jafar, Jafar, he's our man--if he can't do it,
GREAT!
JASMINE is trapped. However, JAFAR sees this and blocks the path.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN uses the distraction to make a break for the hourglass where
ALADDIN is thrown away, and he loses his sword.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Aladdin!
cannot, and the front half of JAFAR crashes through a wall and
hangs outside the palace. ALADDIN jumps up on the snake's back
and stabs it. JAFAR screams in agony. ALADDIN again tries to

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ALADDIN jumps on a large gem and slides across the floor, grabbing
the sword on his way. He turns a corner, but the pursuing snake
free the princess.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Hang on, Jasmine!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He is about to hit the glass with his sword when JAFAR grabs him.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: (laughs hideously) You little fool! You thought
you could defeat the most powerful being on earth!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: (with GENIE coming up behind him) Squeeze him,
Jafar--Squeeze him like a--awk! (GENIE elbows him
out of the way)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Without the genie, boy, you're nothing!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (Has an idea) The genie! The genie! The genie
has more power than you'll ever have!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: What!!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: He gave you your power, he can take it away!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Al, what are you doing? Why are you bringing me
into this?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Face it, Jafar--you're still just second best!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: You're right! His power does exceed my own! But
not for long!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR circles around the GENIE.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: The boy is crazy. He's a little punch drunk. One
too many hits with the snake (His hand
turns into a snake and he hits his head with it.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Slave, I make my third wish! I wish to be an all
powerful genie!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Reluctantly) All right, your wish is my command.
Way to go, Al.
JAFAR's snake form dissipates and he turns into a genie. We
see JASMINE's raised hand disappear under the sand. ALADDIN
runs over and finally smashes the glass. Sand and princess

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (GENIE zaps JAFAR with the last GENIE (tm) brand lightning bolt.
pour out.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Yes! Yes! The power! The absolute power!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (to ALADDIN) What have you done?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Trust me!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (A black lamp appears at JAFAR's base. JAFAR is busy conjuring.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: The universe is mine to command, to control!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Not so fast, Jafar! Aren't you forgetting something?
got it! And everything that goes with it!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR looks down questioningly) You wanted to be a genie, you
(Shackles appear on JAFAR's wrists.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: No! No!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: I'm gettin' out of here! Come on, you're the
genie, I don't want--

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (IAGO tries to fly away, but is sucked in with JAFAR.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Phenomenal cosmic powers! Itty bitty living space.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Al, you little genius, you!
and RAJAH are standing together. RAJAH jumps up into the arms of
the SULTAN, then they are all transformed. The SULTAN is crushed
because of the weight of the new RAJAH. The palace reappears

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (ABU turns back to normal, the CARPET re-ravels, JASMINE, the SULTAN
where it used to be in the city. ALADDIN is left holding the
new lamp.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: (Both from inside the lamp.) Get your blasted beak
out of my face!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: IAGO
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, shut up, you moron!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JAFAR
SPEECH.LINE: Don't tell me to shut up!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Allow me. (He takes the lamp and goes to the
balcony. He is now wearing a baseball cap. He
winds up as if to throw the lamp, but opens his
palm flat and flicks it out into the desert
with his finger.) Ten- thousand years in a cave of
wonders ought to chill him out!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (JAFAR and IAGO continue to argue as they fade out. JASMINE walks
over to ALADDIN. They hold hands, but both look sad.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine, I'm sorry I lied to you about being a
prince.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: I know why you did.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Well, I guess...this... is goodbye? (GENIE pokes
his head around the corner shocked at what he is
hearing.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, that stupid law. This isn't fair--I love you.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (Wipes away a tear) Al, no problem. You've still
got one wish left. Just say the word and you're a
prince again.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: But Genie, what about your freedom?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Hey, it's only an eternity of servitude. This is
love. (He leans down next to her.) Al, you're
not gonna find another girl like her in a million
years. Believe me, I know. I've looked.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Jasmine, I do love you, but I've got to stop
pretending to be something I'm not.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: I understand.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They take one final look into each other's eyes, then ALADDIN turns
to the GENIE.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Genie, I wish for your freedom.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: One bona fide prince pedigree coming up. I--what?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: (He holds the lamp up to GENIE.) Genie, you're
free!
GENIE's wrist and the lamp falls uselessly to the ground.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (A transformation scene ensues, in which the shackles fall off
GENIE picks it up and looks at it.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: (He can't believe it.) Heh, heh! I'm free. I'm
free. (He hands the lamp to ALADDIN.) Quick,
quick, wish for something outrageous. Say "I want
the Nile." Wish for the Nile. Try that!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: I wish for the Nile.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: No way!! (Laughs hysterically. He bounces around
the balcony like a pinball.) Oh does that feel
good! I'm free! I'm free at last! I'm hittin'
the road. I'm off to see the world! I--

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (He is packing a suitcase, but looks down and sees ALADDIN looking
very sad.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Genie, I'm--I'm gonna miss you.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Me too, Al. No matter what anybody says, you'll
always be a prince to me.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They hug. The SULTAN steps forward.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: That's right. You've certainly proven your worth
as far as I'm concerned. It's that law that's the
problem.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: Father?

SPEECH.SPEAKER: SULTAN
SPEECH.LINE: Well, am I sultan or am I sultan? From this day
forth, the princess shall marry whomever she deems
worthy.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: (She smiles widely and runs into ALADDIN's arms.)
Him! I choose...I choose you, Aladdin.

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: Ha, ha. Call me Al.

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They are about to kiss when giant blue hands pull everybody together.
GENIE is decked out in a Hawaiian shirt with golf clubs and a Goofy
hat.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Oh, all of ya. Come over here. Big group hug!
Mind if I kiss the monkey? (He kisses ABU.) Ooh,
hairball! Well, I can't do any more damage around
this popsicle stand. I'm outta here! Bye, bye,
you two crazy lovebirds. Hey, Rugman: ciao! I'm
history! No, I'm mythology! No, I don't care
what I am--I'm free!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (The GENIE flies up into the blue sky leaving a trail of sparkles
behind him. They cut (a jump cut to make matters worse)
to fireworks exploding over a nightscape. We tilt down and see
ALADDIN and JASMINE flying on CARPET.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: ALADDIN
SPEECH.LINE: A whole new world

SPEECH.SPEAKER: JASMINE
SPEECH.LINE: A whole new life

SPEECH.SPEAKER: BOTH
SPEECH.LINE: (with off-camera chorus) For you and me!

SPEECH.SPEAKER: MEN'S CHORUS
SPEECH.LINE: A whole new world!
the moon turns and reveals the GENIE's laughing face. Suddenly
the film is grabbed "off the projector", the GENIE lifts it up

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (They fly off into the moonlight, and after they have disappeared,
and looks at the audience.)

SPEECH.SPEAKER: GENIE
SPEECH.LINE: Made ya look!

SCENE.STAGEDIR: (Drops the film back to normal, with the normal moon. Fade to black.
The end.)
